message:
prelude: promote DateRangeError / TimedeltaRangeError / cast_scalar_owned / read_csv_with_index_cols

Final round of paired-surface defects (fd90.10-15). Five items at
crate root paired with already-promoted counterparts:

- DateRangeError              (paired error for date_range / bdate_range)
- TimedeltaRangeError         (paired error for timedelta_range)
- cast_scalar_owned           (paired with cast_scalar for owned input)
- read_csv_with_index_cols
- read_csv_with_index_cols_path
                              (pair with read_csv_with_options pattern)

Adds fd90_016_paired_helpers_via_prelude — compile guard fn that names
the two error types in its signature plus references the three module-
level fns by name.

Remaining top-level-only items are legitimately advanced/internal:
- 17 SQL index_col reader variants (power-user)
- 10 alignment-planning internals (AACE machinery)
- 10 expression-engine internals (below DataFrameExprExt)
- 9 advanced runtime types (RuntimePolicy + EvidenceLedger are the
  user-facing surface; rest is internal AACE)
- 6 lower-level datetime utilities (date_range / bdate_range are the
  user-facing surface)

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.16.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -445,6 +445,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.13","title":"prelude: promote 9 SQL schema/iterator return types (SqlChunkIterator/Schema/Reflected/etc.)","description":"Fourth in the paired-surface defect series (fd90.10/11/12 caught inspect, list_sql_*, series_*_arrow_array). Found by systematic top-level vs prelude diff.

Nine SQL types are exposed at the crate root but absent from the prelude despite being the public RETURN TYPES of SqlInspector methods (which IS in the prelude). Users calling inspector.columns() get back a SqlTableSchema but can't name the type they got via prelude alone.

Missing from prelude:
- SqlChunkIterator        — return type of read_sql_chunks
- SqlColumnSchema         — element type of SqlTableSchema.columns
- SqlForeignKeySchema     — return type of inspector.foreign_keys
- SqlIndexSchema          — return type of inspector.indexes
- SqlIndexedChunkIterator — chunked iterator with index_col
- SqlQueryResult          — return type of inspector queries
- SqlReflectedTable       — return type of inspector.reflect_table
- SqlTableSchema          — return type of inspector.columns
- SqlUniqueConstraintSchema — return type of inspector.unique_constraints

Plan: promote all 9 to the prelude. Add a compile guard test that names each type explicitly to lock in the surface.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:46:52.930655526Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:48:33.049110151Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:48:33.046939279Z","close_reason":"completed: 9 SQL schema/iterator types promoted to prelude with compile guard (commit 171e285)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.13","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:46:52.930655526Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.14","title":"prelude: promote 7 fp-types user-facing helpers (Interval/Period/Timedelta/Timestamp + helpers)","description":"Fifth paired-surface defect (fd90.10-13 fixed inspect, list_sql_*, series_*_arrow_array, SQL schema return types).

The fd90.263 / fd90.271 commits added 7 pandas-equivalent helper types and 3 range constructors at the crate root but missed prelude promotion. Users frequently need these: Scalar variants for Datetime64/Timedelta64/Period/Interval already round-trip through Scalar, but richer parsing / inspection requires the helper types.

Missing from prelude:
- Interval                  (paired with Scalar::Interval; from fd90.263)
- IntervalClosed            (variant param for Interval construction)
- Period                    (paired with Scalar::Period)
- PeriodFreq                (variant param for Period construction)
- Timedelta                 (paired with Scalar::Timedelta64)
- TimedeltaComponents       (struct returned by Timedelta::components())
- TimedeltaError            (error type for Timedelta::parse / arithmetic)
- Timestamp                 (paired with Scalar::Datetime64)
- period_range              (pandas pd.period_range)
- interval_range_by_periods (pandas pd.interval_range)
- interval_range_by_step    (pandas pd.interval_range with step)

Plan: promote all 11 to the prelude with a compile guard.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:49:16.333254334Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:51:15.599454884Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:51:15.597357431Z","close_reason":"completed: 11 fp-types helpers promoted to prelude with compile guard (commit b36bbf7)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.14","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:49:16.333254334Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.15","title":"prelude: promote SparseDType, AggFunc, GroupByOptions, index_to_frame/series","description":"Sixth paired-surface defect (fd90.10-14). Five more user-facing items at crate root but missing from prelude.

- SparseDType  — used with Scalar::Sparse and SparseAccessor (which IS in prelude)
- AggFunc      — paired with DataFrameGroupBy.agg_named (which IS in prelude). README documents groupby aggregation extensively.
- GroupByOptions / GroupByExecutionOptions — option structs for groupby.with_options
- index_to_frame / index_to_series — Index conversion helpers from fd90.270

Plan: promote all 5 to the prelude with compile guard.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:51:54.481733412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:53:49.959550998Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:53:49.957397359Z","close_reason":"completed: 6 helpers promoted to prelude","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.15","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:51:54.481733412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

- DateRangeError          — paired error type for date_range / bdate_range (in prelude)
- TimedeltaRangeError     — paired error type for timedelta_range (in prelude)
- cast_scalar_owned       — paired with cast_scalar (in prelude)
- read_csv_with_index_cols
- read_csv_with_index_cols_path
                          — pair with read_csv_with_options (in prelude)

After this, remaining top-level-only items are legitimately advanced/internal: 17 SQL index_col variants, 10 alignment-planning internals, 10 expression-engine internals (below DataFrameExprExt), 9 advanced runtime types, 6 lower-level datetime/timedelta utilities. Those stay top-level only since they're below the user-facing prelude tier.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:55:00.764047232Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:55:36.337192849Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.16","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:55:00.764047232Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","title":"fp-io read_sql_table chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse the table-name validation/escaping path, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for batching and invalid chunksize/table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.683429602Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.681545888Z","close_reason":"Completed in 693dc14","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","title":"fp-io read_sql_table_columns chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., columns=[...], chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse table/column validation and projection query construction, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, zero chunksize, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.073612091Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.071766828Z","close_reason":"Completed in 03a4ce7","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","title":"fp-io SQL chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine pandas-style chunksize with index_col promotion. Cover read_sql/read_sql_query/read_sql_table chunk paths by wrapping SqlChunkIterator, preserving per-chunk RangeIndex when index_col is None and promoting/removing the named column when set. Add umbrella re-exports and focused fp-io tests for query chunks, table chunks, None behavior, and missing index_col errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.040272870Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.038384696Z","close_reason":"Completed in 90fd549","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

@@ -477,6 +477,10 @@ pub mod prelude {
         // IO — readers (in-memory + path; covers all 8 documented formats)
         read_csv,
         read_csv_str,
+        // fd90.16: index-cols readers pair with read_csv_with_options
+        // for the index_col argument shape pandas exposes.
+        read_csv_with_index_cols,
+        read_csv_with_index_cols_path,
         read_csv_with_options,
         read_csv_with_options_path,
         read_excel,
@@ -521,6 +525,9 @@ pub mod prelude {
         // fd90.208: pandas-style top-level null checks + dtype helpers.
         // The README documents these as user-facing (lines 359, 771, 957, 1031).
         cast_scalar,
+        // fd90.16: cast_scalar_owned pairs with cast_scalar (above) for
+        // owned-input flows where the caller can move rather than borrow.
+        cast_scalar_owned,
         common_dtype,
         // fd90.262: Vec<Scalar> helpers matching pandas' top-level surface.
         count_na,
@@ -532,6 +539,11 @@ pub mod prelude {
         timedelta_range,
         // fd90.269: bdate_range pairs with date_range (pandas pd.bdate_range).
         bdate_range,
+        // fd90.16: error types paired with the date/timedelta range
+        // constructors above. Without these the user can't pattern-
+        // match on Result<_, DateRangeError> from the prelude alone.
+        DateRangeError,
+        TimedeltaRangeError,
         infer_dtype,
         isna,
         isnull,
